articles.title: Asia stocks gain on AI chipmaker rally as oil surges amid Red Sea tanker attacks
articles.description: Asian shares rally on AI spending bets, led by chipmakers. Oil prices surge on West Asia tensions, impacting US Treasuries and inflation outlook.

articles.title: Inflation pains may get worse this year: West Asia crisis, El Niño key triggers
articles.description: A gradual easing of oil prices can be expected if pre-war equilibrium is restored. But, the question is whether or not producers will lower their final prices.

articles.title: Oil prices jump after Houthis attack two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea
articles.description: Brent increased 1.4% above $95 a barrel post closing at a six-week high in the earlier session. Meanwhile, West Texas Intermediate was close to $88 a barrel.

articles.title: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: Nifty bulls aim to protect 23,800 on Sensex expiry amidst results, higher oil
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: Another Sensex weekly expiry beckons today and the Nifty bulls are latching on to the 24,000 mark by a whisker. There has not been any dramatic improvement in the situation overnight and crude oil prices continue to remain higher. Brent closed above $95 a barrel overnight, while WTI is nearing $85 a barrel this morning.

articles.title: U.S.-Iran Tensions Stabilize Dollar Amid Yen's Historic Low
articles.description: The dollar remained stable on Thursday amid renewed U.S.-Iran tensions, while the Japanese yen hovered near historic lows. The dollar index was flat as rising oil prices due to military strikes increased inflation fears, potentially influencing Federal Reserve interest rate decisions. The yen's weakness is compounded by strong dollar trends.

articles.title: Benchmark indices fall amid rising crude oil prices and West Asia conflict
articles.description: India's benchmark indices ended lower on Wednesday, as crude oil prices increased. The Nifty50 and Sensex experienced significant drops, falling below key levels. Midcap and smallcap stocks also saw declines, reflecting broad market weakness. Most sector indices ended in negative territory, except for FMCG and Auto. Brent crude oil prices rose, impacting investor sentiment across the market.

articles.title: Pre-market action: Here's the trade setup for today's session
articles.description: Domestic equities declined as broad-based selling persisted across sectors. India VIX surged, reflecting heightened market volatility and investor fear. Analysts expect sideways trading with a negative bias due to global tensions. Foreign portfolio investors were net sellers, impacting market sentiment negatively. The Indian rupee fell to a two-month low as oil prices climbed.

articles.title: Oil prices rise to six-week high as US-Iran tensions escalate
articles.description: Oil ​prices rose more than 1.5% to their highest in more than six weeks on Thursday, ‌with the United States launching a new round of strikes on Iran and Yemen's Houthis targeting oil tankers in the Red Sea.

articles.title: Oil prices rise to six-week high as US-Iran tensions escalate
articles.description: Oil prices rose more than 1.5 per cent to their highest in more than six weeks on Thursday (Jul 23), with the United States launching a new round of strikes on Iran and Yemen's Houthis targeting oil tankers in the Red Sea. articles.title: WTI, Brent rise as Trump threatens strikes on Iran infrastructure
articles.description: Oil prices rose after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iranian infrastructure in response to any attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
